summary:
To diagnose and manage an infected leaking meningomyelocele in this neonate, obtain a wound swab sample that can detect specific local pathogens contributing to tissue inflammation near the lesion site.
To ensure accurate identification of infectious agents potentially causing issues at the exact location where cerebrospinal fluid may have leaked due to the malformation, prioritize performing a wound culture over other less targeted diagnostic tests available here.
